cover.subtitle:
7·4 성명에서 판문점까지,
네 번의 약속.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: two hands clasped in a handshake across a wide horizontal line representing the DMZ, with a small Panmunjom-style blue building roof silhouette in the background. Below the handshake: a delicate Korean peninsula outline. Color palette: cold gray + navy + a single sky-blue accent on the building roof. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 7·4 성명의 3대 원칙(자주·평화·민족대단결), 남북기본합의서의 성격, 6·15와 10·4 선언의 주체 구분이 빈출. 금강산·개성공단·경의선의 시기도 함께 정리.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small silhouette of two clasped hands and a Korean peninsula outline (no readable text). Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
